Connect

The Degen L3 chain is coming soon! EVM compatible, low transaction fees, built for Degens!

Airdrop 1



Our very first airdrop has officially come to a close, and we couldn't be more excited about the overwhelming success and engagement from our community. We want to extend a colossal thank you to every single participant for making this event truly spectacular. Your support and enthusiasm have been the driving force behind this achievement. Here's to more thrilling adventures together!

Claim

Connect your wallet to claim your rewards!

Airdrop 1 rewards can be claimed until May 1, 2024.

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
